issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss or complete the duplicate tasks as appropriate.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO's name instead of the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where Julie Yocum had replaced Paul. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reflect the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred continued to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of unenrolling. HAs received weekly check-in tasks for deals that should have been inactive. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to address the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks received for deals already marked as Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: TC workflow tasks not triggering when deal re-enrolled to Offer Accepted after reverting to earlier stage
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, reverted to an earlier stage (e.g., Committed or Referred Active), and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow did not re-trigger tasks for closing info collection. The root cause was that deal stage Offer Accepted was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their associated tasks. The issue affected deals with no lender officer assigned, which is typical for MRC leads. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was fixed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between the impact window start and April 1 into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
